caption: The video shows a person holding a handmade birthday card with both hands, showcasing it to the camera. The card features a camouflage pattern with shades of green and brown, and a wooden texture on the left side. A white circular tag is attached to the card with a piece of twine, and it reads, "Hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things." The background includes various crafting supplies such as a grid cutting mat, a stamping tool, and other materials, indicating that the card was likely made using these items. The person's hands gently adjust the card to ensure it is clearly visible, emphasizing the details and craftsmanship of the design.
